shareCodeBanner: Share your code with your Sun to connect
inviteShareMessage: I'm using Easel to understand and support you better. Download it and share your code with me so we can connect: https://easel.app
moonNoCheckIn: No check-in today yet — her phase gives a sense of how she may be feeling
moonHasntSetUp: Moon's cycle details will appear once she's set up.
greetingMenstrual1: Rest is productive. Let today be gentle.
greetingMenstrual2: Your body is working hard — honour it.
greetingMenstrual3: Slow down and let yourself be held by the day.
greetingFollicular1: Fresh energy is on the way. You've got this.
greetingFollicular2: A new chapter is beginning — step into it.
greetingFollicular3: Feel the spark? The world is ready for you.
greetingOvulatory1: You're glowing. Let that light out today.
greetingOvulatory2: This is your moment to connect and create.
greetingOvulatory3: Peak energy — go do something you love.
greetingLuteal1: Slow and steady. You don't have to do it all.
greetingLuteal2: Trust your feelings — they know what they need.
greetingLuteal3: Cosy mode activated. You've earned some peace.
periodStartedMessage: This will log today as the start of your period and update your cycle predictions.
periodEndedMessage: This will mark your current period as ended today.
cycleShiftNotice: Moon's cycle has shifted — consider checking in with her
